## Review Checklist

- [ ] Message is clear
- [ ] Target audience is clear
- [ ] CTA is included where needed
- [ ] No unapproved pricing
- [ ] No exaggerated claims
- [ ] Brand tone is followed
- [ ] File is stored in the correct folder
- [ ] Content is ready for the next step

## Notes for Reviewer

Add anything the reviewer should know.
